channel.title: Matt Parker — Releases
channel.description: Tagged releases across the public archive by Matt Parker.

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.5
item.description: Changed: · - Added the 2026-07-07 improvement backlog to the local roadmap split. · - Modernized roadmap target language to the shipped .NET 10 architecture.

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.4
item.description: Changed: · - Refined WPF parity with native dark title bar, Tools/update actions, observed DNS status labels, blocked-row danger cue, and a closable inspector header. · - Refreshed dark/light Hosts Activity screenshots a

item.title: SysAdminDoc v4.9.152
item.description: Modernized the SysAdminDoc profile README into a local, theme-aware public tools command center with refreshed routing, setup, validation, and live rendered-smoke evidence.

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.3
item.description: Changed: · - Tightened the WPF shell against the generated design reference with a concept-scale 1280x800 default window, icon-led main navigation, and a denser operational left rail. · - Reworked Hosts Activity controls

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.2
item.description: Changed: · - Re-imagined the WPF shell around a persistent status rail with service health, filtering posture, key counters, refresh/reset actions, scale, and theme controls visible across the app. · - Modernized the act

item.title: sysadmindoc.github.io v0.21.8
item.description: Restored the homepage contribution heatmap with accessible keyboard and forced-colors support. Corrected the performance audit so load-phase LCP is measured before scripted interaction checks. Includes the built static s

item.title: SwiftFloris v1.9.55
item.description: Smart-compose ghost text no longer blocks while reading personal trigram/bigram storage. The heuristic provider and cache now expose a suspend-aware prediction path used by the NLP worker, reducing per-keystroke stalls w

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.27
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.27 · Added rotating shift-pattern scheduling for DDNNO, 4-on-4-off, Panama, DuPont, and Pitman cycles. · Shift patterns can act as the recurring schedule by themselves or narrow existing weekday se

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.26
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.26 · - Adds Bedtime pre-sleep factor tiles for caffeine, exercise, alcohol, and stress. · - Adds a local correlation chart comparing tagged nights with Sonar/smart-wake restlessness.

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.25
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.25 · - Adds a local Sonar snore/loud-sound event timeline on the Bedtime screen. · - Stores compact start/end/duration/peak/average dB metadata only; no raw audio is retained.

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.24
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.24 · - Adds a local chronotype quiz on the Bedtime screen. · - Estimates ideal bedtime and wake windows from five on-device answers and the sleep-duration target.

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.23
item.description: v1.15.23 · - Adds a local bedtime room-noise baseline when microphone permission is already granted. · - Bedtime reminders now adapt copy for quiet, moderate, or loud room baseline results.

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.1
item.description: - Premium-polished the WPF shell and core controls across dark and light themes. · - Reduced startup lockout after the service handshake while tab data continues loading. · - Refined confirmation, consent, and text-input

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.6
item.description:
Desktop panel fit.

- Lowered the right analytical panel lane so it sits closer to the season/timeline shelf.
- Tightened the shelf gutter from 12px to 6px while preserving separation.
- Added smoke coverage that fai

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.5
item.description:
Desktop shelf alignment.

- Moved the season summary inline to the left of the timeline as one bottom shelf.
- Reserved bottom shelf space so desktop side panels stop above the season/timeline row.
- Moved update fee

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.4
item.description:
Desktop panel refinement.

- Rebalanced desktop side panels into a wider bounded inspector lane.
- Reworked storm, state, and statistics panels into stable two-column desktop grids.
- Hid the season summary while ana

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.3
item.description:
Premium layout and settings polish.

- Prioritizes the map during mobile track playback with compact header chrome, a smaller restore handle, and a tighter animation dock.
- Refines Settings with helper copy, localize

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.2
item.description: Playback map-first layout. Starting track playback now collapses the storm details panel to a restore tab, moves animation controls into a compact fixed map dock, hides competing bottom overlays during playback, and adds

item.title: SwiftShot v2.8.0
item.description: Audit-backlog drain: all 14 verified-but-deferred findings from the v2.7.0 deep audit are now fixed end-to-end, with regression tests (54 -> 75). · - Rotate View no longer breaks mouse-to-image mapping; a shared view tra

item.title: SwiftShot v2.7.0
item.description: Deep audit release: ~50 verified fixes across correctness, data safety, UX, theming, accessibility and performance. Test suite grew from 34 to 54 tests. · **Capture** · - Freehand region capture masks to the drawn shape

item.title: ScriptVault v3.17.0
item.description: Trust enforcement, sync data-safety, and backup slimming. · - **Subresource Integrity "Require" mode is now enforced** — refuses to run any @require/@resource without a verifiable SRI hash; the install review flags every

item.title: ScriptVault v3.16.0
item.description: Deep engineering + product-quality audit pass. · - **GM networking bound to the authenticated caller.** GM_xmlhttpRequest / GM_webSocket / GM_download, GM_getResourceText/URL, GM_loadScript, and menu register/unregister

item.title: ScriptVault v3.15.1
item.description: - **Editor screen was unusable in v3.15.0.** The full-screen editor overlay stacked below the sticky dashboard header, which painted over the Save/Close row and panel tabs — nothing in the top band was visible or clickab

item.title: ScriptVault v3.15.0
item.description: - **Script Store tab removed entirely.** The eagerly-loaded multi-source discovery tab (~2,100 lines) is gone; script discovery lives in the lighter Find Scripts dialog (toolbar, popup, side panel), Collections, and Gist

item.title: one-ui-home-clone v0.2.3
item.description: Roadmap drain release: adds Finder app shortcut results, records the SESL interop decision, and includes the accumulated launcher reliability/parity work for baseline profiles, backup/restore, diagnostics, privacy disclo

item.title: Images v0.2.15
item.description: - **AsyncRelayCommand catches non-cancellation exceptions** — Exceptions from command methods now log + toast instead of propagating through `async void` to `DispatcherUnhandledException` and terminating the app. Static

item.title: Images v0.2.14
item.description: - GoBack/GoForward no longer corrupt history on failed navigation · - OpenRecentArchiveCommand converted to AsyncRelayCommand (crash fix) · - SaveAsCopyAsync captures source path before yield (TOCTOU race fix)

item.title: Disable-AdobeTelemetry v2.5.0
item.description: Research-driven roadmap drain: 30+ fixes and features across security, fleet operations, coverage, and UX. · - Firewall phase no longer deletes the CCXProcess/AdobeIPCBroker rules created by earlier phases (they survived

item.title: AppList v1.8.0
item.description: - **WSL distro inventory** -- discovers installed WSL distributions with version and state · - **Portable-app detection** -- scans user-local Programs/Portable/Tools/Apps and PortableApps directories · - **Driver invento

item.title: AppList v1.7.0
item.description: - **Frozen pip scan guard** — PyInstaller builds no longer relaunch the packed exe for pip scanning · - **Non-destructive bundle writes** — Restore bundles refuse non-empty folders by default, use atomic staging · - **Ve

item.title: UniFile v9.3.32
item.description: - Schema-validated structured outputs for all LLM classify calls (Ollama `format` + OpenAI `response_format`) · - Centralized `ai_request()` helper with retry, backoff, API key redaction, and normalized errors · - Full t

item.title: Start-Menu-Organizer v0.14.0
item.description: - Block reparse-point (junction/symlink) traversal in scans and mutations · - Full shortcut metadata extraction with risk classification (ScriptHost, NetworkTarget, HiddenExecution, LongArguments, WebTarget, ScriptTarget

item.title: TelemetrySlayer v1.6.0
item.description: - **Silent RMM mode**: `-Silent -Preset Balanced|Minimal|Paranoid -ConfigPath <json> -WhatIf -LogPath <path>` for automated deployment · - **Edge Copilot/sidebar/WebView2 coverage**: UserFeedbackAllowed, HubsSidebarEnabl

item.title: Disable-AdobeTelemetry v2.4.0
item.description: - GUI at full CLI parity: watchdog install/remove, profile import/export file pickers, WFP trace configuration, plumbing test controls, and JSON status save with file capture. · - Dark-themed TextBox styling consistent w

item.title: Keepr v0.25.14
item.description: Microsoft Store installer lane. Adds src-tauri/tauri.microsoftstore.conf.json and npm run build:store-installer so Store-flavored NSIS/MSI installers use offline WebView2 mode for Partner Center validation. Partner Cente

item.title: Keepr v0.25.13
item.description: Zustand pin removal. Upgrades Zustand from the exact 5.0.1 pin to ^5.0.14 after the existing static/dynamic ESM import regression guard passed, proving the app keeps one shared store instance. npm outdated --long now rep

item.title: Keepr v0.25.12
item.description: TypeScript 6 and ESLint 10 lane. Upgrades TypeScript to 6.0.3, ESLint to 10.6.0, @eslint/js to 10.0.1, and @types/node to 26.0.1. Removes eslint-plugin-react because its latest peer range stops at ESLint 9 and Keepr only

item.title: Keepr v0.25.11
item.description: Tailwind 4 migration. Upgrades Tailwind CSS to 4.3.2, moves CSS generation to @tailwindcss/vite, removes the old PostCSS config plus top-level autoprefixer/postcss, preserves Keepr's class-based dark mode with @custom-va

item.title: Keepr v0.25.10
item.description: Vite 8 migration: upgraded Vite to 8.1.2 and @vitejs/plugin-react to 6.0.3, removed the completed Vite roadmap lane, and cleared npm audit. Verification: npm test, npm run lint, npm run build, npm run build:clipper, carg

item.title: Start-Menu-Organizer v0.13.0
item.description: Added Selected Profile and Default User scope options with explicit profile-root validation, separate Profile and DefaultUser backup/restore scopes, admin-gated profile/default mutations through the guarded file-operatio

item.title: NetForge v1.51.0
item.description: - Adds diagnostics export privacy mode with preview manifest and bundled redaction-report.json.\n- Redacts webhook URLs, proxy hosts, mapped-drive UNC paths, SSIDs, MACs, adapter names, and local paths when privacy mode

item.title: NetForge v1.50.0
item.description: - App interface guards now persist program path plus allowed adapter for drift repair.\n- Startup, NetworkChange, and manual Refresh Guards reconcile missing or stale NetForge-owned firewall rules.\n- Adds Pester coverag

item.title: NetForge v1.49.0
item.description: Changed: Discord webhook URLs now migrate from plaintext settings to current-user DPAPI-protected storage. · Added: Pester coverage for protected webhook storage, legacy migration, missing secret, and invalid protected d

item.title: NetForge v1.48.0
item.description: Added Network Tools app interface guard for restricting a selected executable to one allowed adapter using Windows Firewall/WFP interface filters. Added apply, remove, refresh, and list controls for NetForge-owned per-ap

item.title: NetForge v1.47.0
item.description: Added optional Discord webhook notifications after successful profile applies from GUI, tray, scheduled, auto-apply, RDP, and CLI paths. Added Diagnostics endpoint-policy controls for saving the webhook URL with token-re

item.title: WURepair v2.17.0
item.description: Adds -PlainText deterministic ASCII console output for automation logs, RMM consoles, and screen readers. Plain-text mode suppresses progress rendering and color-only status while preserving log file output. · SHA256: 6b

item.title: Start-Menu-Organizer v0.12.0
item.description: Added centralized UI strings with optional JSON localization overrides, automation names and help text for core controls, predictable tab order, raised muted-text contrast, WPF XAML load coverage, and accessibility/local

item.title: WURepair v2.16.0
item.description: Adds -SupportBundle for redacted diagnostic zip creation with WURepair log, JSON report, WindowsUpdate.log, CBS/DISM tails, relevant event exports, and manifest. Adds -NoRedact for intentional raw support bundles and a .

item.title: Start-Menu-Organizer v0.11.0
item.description: Added dated JSONL file logging under LOCALAPPDATA, crash-log files for unhandled WPF dispatcher/AppDomain/top-level runtime exceptions, operation IDs in guarded operation and journal logs, log rotation, and structured lo

item.title: WURepair v2.15.0
item.description: Adds managed update-source guardrails for WSUS/SUP/WUfB policy values. Full repair preserves managed source policy by default and requires -ResetManagedUpdatePolicy for intentional removal. · SHA256: 77f5c9c3f7f4655df0aa
